governing_requirement: Publish an executable, versioned MaskFactory-to-Main field, enum and version crosswalk with exact conversion and required/drop/default/reject rules, producer-observation handling and producer/consumer compatibility tests.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-09.07 remains blocked by every incomplete declared prerequisite and by the absent executable producer/consumer mapping. Strict frozen producer contracts receive partial credit.

prior_evidence.disposition: Accepted for requirement mapping, probes and the additive implementation packet. Prerequisite states are superseded by the current tracker.

verified_foundations: The twelve frozen v1 producer schemas are strict additionalProperties=false contracts with exact schema IDs and schema_version 1.0.0.
Release and consumer-requirements contracts bind the exact closed schema catalog by name, path, version and hash.
Qualification and adoption validation bind actual schema bytes, release/capability/requirements identities, compatibility checks and completion profiles.
Direct request probes reject unknown fields, missing required fields and both unlisted minor and incompatible major schema versions.
Three focused positive/schema-registry/release-policy tests pass and Ruff reports no issues; governing source hashes match the accepted prior audit.
confirmed_gaps: No executable crosswalk artifact contains producer and Main JSON pointers, conversion rules, enum mappings, requiredness, nullability, defaults, drop/reject behavior or order sensitivity.
No path resolver or coverage verifier proves that each required and authority-bearing producer field maps exactly once or is explicitly rejected.
No versioned compatibility policy can explicitly permit a named optional minor addition while keeping all unlisted drift fail-closed.
No executable exhaustive enum mapping proves that Main handles each producer value exactly once and rejects additions, removals or unknowns.
No mapping rule preserves use_eligibility as producer evidence while excluding it from Main authority and requiring independent consumer recomputation.
No cross-project result binds the crosswalk ID/hash, exact pinned Main adapter contract/commit and consumer fixture evidence.

implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths remain absent and clean. Frozen v1 and candidate files are read-only for this packet.

consumer_dependency.required_return: Exact Main adapter contract/version, crosswalk hash, executable consumer mapping tests, incompatible-version/unknown-field rejection and producer-observation disagreement evidence.

implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-09.01 through MF-P6-09.06 are implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits strict frozen producer schemas, exact catalog binding and fail-closed unlisted drift only. It does not implement or adopt a producer/Main crosswalk, prove Main consumer behavior, complete any prerequisite, or complete MF-P6-09.07.
